description: Measures business impact of an OTel Demo incident on completed orders. Uses `?tstart`–`?tend` as the incident window and compares order volume against two baselines: the 5 equal windows immediately before the incident, and the same time yesterday (±2 adjacent windows). Returns order drop (% and estimated count vs each baseline) and estimated revenue loss (lost orders × average order amount from the matching baseline). Use when investigating a production or demo incident, answering “how many orders did we lose?”, “what is the business/revenue impact?”, or correlating an observability alert with a drop in orders-otel-demo order throughput.

configuration.query:
FROM orders-otel-demo
| EVAL window_ms = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", ?tstart, ?tend)
| EVAL w = CONCAT(TO_STRING(window_ms), " milliseconds")
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?tstart - 1 day - w::TIME_DURATION - w::TIME_DURATION AND @timestamp < ?tend
| EVAL rel_ms  = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", ?tstart, @timestamp)
| EVAL rel_ys  = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", ?tstart - 1 day, @timestamp)
| EVAL rel_ye  = DATE_DIFF("milliseconds", ?tend   - 1 day, @timestamp)
| EVAL segment = CASE(
    rel_ms >= 0 AND rel_ms < window_ms, "incident",
    rel_ms >= -1 * window_ms AND rel_ms < 0, "recent_prev_1",
    rel_ms >= -2 * window_ms AND rel_ms < -1 * window_ms, "recent_prev_2",
    rel_ms >= -3 * window_ms AND rel_ms < -2 * window_ms, "recent_prev_3",
    rel_ms >= -4 * window_ms AND rel_ms < -3 * window_ms, "recent_prev_4",
    rel_ms >= -5 * window_ms AND rel_ms < -4 * window_ms, "recent_prev_5",
    rel_ys >= -2 * window_ms AND rel_ys < -1 * window_ms, "yday_prev_2",
    rel_ys >= -1 * window_ms AND rel_ys < 0, "yday_prev_1",
    rel_ys >= 0 AND rel_ys < window_ms, "yday_same",
    rel_ye >= 0 AND rel_ye < window_ms, "yday_next_1",
    rel_ye >= 1 * window_ms AND rel_ye < 2 * window_ms, "yday_next_2",
    "other"
  )
| WHERE segment != "other"
| STATS
    incident_orders = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "incident",
    recent_prev_1   = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "recent_prev_1",
    recent_prev_2   = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "recent_prev_2",
    recent_prev_3   = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "recent_prev_3",
    recent_prev_4   = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "recent_prev_4",
    recent_prev_5   = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "recent_prev_5",
    yday_prev_2     = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "yday_prev_2",
    yday_prev_1     = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "yday_prev_1",
    yday_same       = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "yday_same",
    yday_next_1     = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "yday_next_1",
    yday_next_2     = COUNT(*) WHERE segment == "yday_next_2",
    recent_avg_order_amount = AVG(attributes.app.order.amount) WHERE segment IN (
      "recent_prev_1", "recent_prev_2", "recent_prev_3", "recent_prev_4", "recent_prev_5"
    ),
    yday_avg_order_amount = AVG(attributes.app.order.amount) WHERE segment IN (
      "yday_prev_2", "yday_prev_1", "yday_same", "yday_next_1", "yday_next_2"
    )
| EVAL
    recent_5_window_avg = (recent_prev_1 + recent_prev_2 + recent_prev_3 + recent_prev_4 + recent_prev_5) / 5.0,
    yday_5_window_avg   = (yday_prev_2 + yday_prev_1 + yday_same + yday_next_1 + yday_next_2) / 5.0
| EVAL
  orders_lost_vs_recent = CASE(recent_5_window_avg > incident_orders, recent_5_window_avg - incident_orders, 0.0),
  orders_lost_vs_yday   = CASE(yday_5_window_avg > incident_orders, yday_5_window_avg - incident_orders, 0.0)
| EVAL
  order_drop_pct_vs_recent = CASE(
    recent_5_window_avg > 0,
    ROUND(100.0 * (incident_orders - recent_5_window_avg) / recent_5_window_avg, 2),
    null
  ),
  order_drop_pct_vs_yday = CASE(
    yday_5_window_avg > 0,
    ROUND(100.0 * (incident_orders - yday_5_window_avg) / yday_5_window_avg, 2),
    null
  )
| EVAL
  revenue_loss_vs_recent = CASE(
    orders_lost_vs_recent > 0 AND recent_avg_order_amount IS NOT NULL,
    ROUND(orders_lost_vs_recent * recent_avg_order_amount, 2),
    0.0
  ),
  revenue_loss_vs_yday = CASE(
    orders_lost_vs_yday > 0 AND yday_avg_order_amount IS NOT NULL,
    ROUND(orders_lost_vs_yday * yday_avg_order_amount, 2),
    0.0
  )
| KEEP
  order_drop_pct_vs_recent,
  orders_lost_vs_recent,
  revenue_loss_vs_recent,
  order_drop_pct_vs_yday,
  orders_lost_vs_yday,
  revenue_loss_vs_yday

tstart.description: Timestamp of the start of the analysis

tend.description: Timestamp of the end of the analysis

tstart.description: Timestamp of the start of the analysis

tend.description: Timestamp of the end of the analysis

schema.description: Parameters needed to execute the query
